title: Anomalies and Fermion Zero Modes on Strings and Domain Walls
canonical_scope: External source anchor for anomaly inflow and domain-wall zero-mode cancellation in the topological-phases edge-mode family.

section_map.title: Main Result
section_map.summary: Chiral zero modes on strings or domain walls are accompanied by bulk topological terms whose variation cancels the boundary anomaly.

section_map.title: Domain-Wall Chiral Zero Modes
section_map.summary: A sign-changing mass profile supports lower-dimensional chiral fermions localized on the wall.

section_map.title: Bulk Inflow Cancels The Wall Anomaly
section_map.summary: The gauge anomaly of the wall-localized chiral mode is exactly canceled by the variation of the bulk topological term.

section_map.title: Parity-Anomaly Bridge
section_map.summary: The same mechanism ties odd-dimensional parity anomalies to even-dimensional chiral anomalies and index-density inflow.

equation_map.label: bulk-topological-variation
equation_map.title: Gauge variation of the bulk topological term on a manifold with boundary

equation_map.label: inflow-balance
equation_map.title: Cancellation between wall anomaly and bulk inflow
